textPlain: Have to say I really liked reading the article on mobile.I have smaller phone even but layout was good an spacing was great.Black text on white background not some grayish to look different but perfectly legible.

> It will be read in the wrong orderI really dislike it when this happens. This also affects copy/pasting. This typically seems to happen with LaTeX-style two-column layouts, where columns are supposed to be read top to bottom, left to right, but tools end up reading paragraphs from left to right, top to bottom. It's infuriating.PDFs suck. And it's awful that they're the least bad option for a lot of things.
